text:
Once upon a time in the mystical lands of Everdale, there lived a clever fox named Fergus. One moonlit night, Fergus was out exploring when he stumbled upon a glowing gem deep in the forest. Intrigued, he pocketed it.

Days turned into weeks, and Fergus found himself strangely content carrying the gem. One evening, he found himself sitting by a sparkling lake watching the stars. Suddenly remembering his precious jewel, he thought to himself, "How could I ever forget this?" Then he remembered a clever trick: He would shine this gem at the moon.

So he did. To his astonishment, a cascade of sparkling moonbeams spilled out all over the lake. Creatures from the depths began to float upwards, all emitting their own beams. Fergus danced among them, creating an illuminated forest orchestra.

Around midnight, wise old owl Harpers hooted from a towering oak. "Well met, young Fergus. That shining gem is the Glittering
